reason: Initialization general AGENTS Project skeleton,and establish basic automated execution capabilities
Establish a unified rule entry,Reduce ambiguities in rule understanding that may arise when multiple people collaborate
Precipitate a set of reusable project templates,Reduce initialization costs for future new projects
Replace verbal agreements with scripted processes,Make the execution process more stable and consistent
Provide a stable starting point for subsequent milestone expansion and visual governance system
action: Create a core constraint document template,include AGENTS,BACKGROUND,MILESTONE,CHANGE,TREE
Write basic rule verification scripts,Used to check document structure and field integrity
Build an initial version of the local visualization workbench,Support core document reading,Edit and Preview
Establish TREE Automatic synchronization,Script execution link for baseline refresh and final verification
The unified timestamp format is YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM,and align all document field structures
observation: The project already has rule governance,Basic capabilities for automatic verification and closed-loop execution
The final inspection process can output clear error messages,Conveniently and quickly locate and repair problems
The file tree structure and structured data can be updated synchronously
The visualization page can already support browsing and editing operations in the initialization stage.
New milestones in the future can be directly expanded on the current template.
notes: The current version only records core changes during the initialization phase of the project
This record is used to precipitate a baseline template that can be reused when starting future projects.
Subsequently added records need to increment the version number and add content on this basis.
If the user manually modifies the read-only rules file,It is recommended to execute it first baseline_refresh Update baseline
This record is reserved as a reference example during the initialization phase.
suggestions: It is recommended to add automated regression scripts for front-end interaction,To continuously verify the stability of page functionality
It is recommended to add a hierarchical prompt mechanism for rule conflicts,And provide automatic repair wizard
It is recommended to split multi-level milestone views in large projects,to improve governance clarity
It is recommended to gradually change key dependencies to local static resources,To support offline operating environment
